text:

Author: rakuco

Log:
  Update to 6.8.0.

  The suite is entirely php based, then the package is now defined as NO_ARCH.
  Some benchmark added and php reporting improved.

  PR:		215414
  Submitted by:	Lucca Pizzamiglio <luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com> (maintainer)
